properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Breathe on me, breath of God Love and life that makes me free Breathe on me, breath of God Fan the flame within me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Teach my heart, heal my soul Speak the mind that in Christ we know Take me to Your sanctuary Breathe on me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Speak to me, voice of God Soft and still, inside my heart (speak to me) Speak to me, word of God Comfort, heal, restore with light

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Teach my heart and heal my soul Speak the mind that in Christ we know Take me to Your sanctuary (teach my heart)

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Teach my heart (and heal my soul), heal my soul Speak the mind that in Christ we know (take me to) Take me to Your sanctuary (teach my heart)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Teach my heart (and heal my soul), heal my soul Speak the mind that in Christ we know Take me to Your sanctuary Breathe on me, breathe on me Breathe on me (Breathe on me)

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Breathe on me (take me to Your sanctuary) Breathe on me (take me to Your sanctuary) Breathe on me
